name: Configure questionnaire with 'Visible only for consultant' and verify 'Set Answers to' action is executed when Question condition is triggered on 'Entering the questionnaire the first time' and check Questionnaire 'Set item list field to' action

steps.name: Navigate to questionnaire configuration and create a new questionnaire
Fill "Multiple choice buttons with standard answer set" getByTestId('questionName')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Click locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Multiple choice buttons with standard answer set').last()
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByText('Multiple choice buttons with standard answer set').last()
Click getByText('Multiple choice buttons with standard answer set').last()
Fill "Answer should set to No" getByTestId('questionName')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })

Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Click locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })

Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Click locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Fill "Multiple choice buttons with Radio buttons / CheckBoxes" getByTestId('questionName')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Inherit the answer from the previous version', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Inherit the answer from the previous version', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Inherit the answer from the previous version', { exact: true })
Click locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Inherit the answer from the previous version', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Radio buttons / CheckBoxes', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Radio buttons / CheckBoxes', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Radio buttons / CheckBoxes', { exact: true })
Click locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Radio buttons / CheckBoxes', { exact: true })
Fill "Multiple choice buttons with Chips Buttons" getByTestId('questionName')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Click locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Click locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Wait for selector getByText('Drag here to add questions')
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Drag here to add questions')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Click locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Entering the questionnaire the first time' })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Entering the questionnaire the first time' })
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'Entering the questionnaire the first time' })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Page name 1', exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Page name 1', exact: true })
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'Page name 1', exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Multiple choice buttons with standard answer set' })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Multiple choice buttons with standard answer set' })

Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Set item list field to', exact: true })

Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Key Performance Indicator (KPI)', exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Key Performance Indicator (KPI)', exact: true })
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'Key Performance Indicator (KPI)', exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Higher is better', exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Higher is better', exact: true })

Veriify visible only for consultant setting is applied
Uncheck visible only for consultant setting and re-publish questionnaire
Navigate to risk and link questionnaire
Wait for selector getByText('Questionnaire_1777547502330 Link').getByRole('checkbox', { name: 'ql._id' })
Open questionnaire and verify all questions visible
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[data-test-mo-question-name="Multiple choice buttons with standard answer set"]')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[data-test-mo-question-name="Multiple choice buttons with Radio buttons / CheckBoxes"]')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[data-test-mo-question-name="Multiple choice buttons with Chips Buttons"]')
Expect "toBeDisabled" locator('[data-test-mo-question-name="Multiple choice buttons with standard answer set"]').locator('[data-testid="multi-choice-button"] button').first()
Verify Buttons style Radio/Checkboxes are visible
Expect "toHaveAttribute" locator('[data-test-mo-question-name="Multiple choice buttons with Radio buttons / CheckBoxes"]').locator('input').last()
Click locator('[data-test-mo-question-name="Multiple choice buttons with Radio buttons / CheckBoxes"]').getByRole('radio', { name: 'No' })
Verify Buttons style chips are visible
Expect "toHaveAttribute" locator('[data-test-mo-question-name="Multiple choice buttons with Chips Buttons"]').locator('input').last()
Click locator('[data-test-mo-question-name="Multiple choice buttons with Chips Buttons"]').locator('input').last()
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('span').filter({ hasText: 'There are errors on this page, therefore this page cannot be completed.' })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('[data-test-mo-question-name="Multiple choice buttons with standard answer set"]').locator('[data-testid="multi-choice-button"] button.active-answer')
verify set answer to action executed when question condition is met
verify set item list field to  action executed when questionnaire condition is met
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('span').filter({ hasText: 'All questionnaire pages are answered, do you want to finish the questionnaire? After finishing you cannot change something anymore.' })
Verify Inherit answer from previous Version
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[aria-label="Close current version and start new version"]')
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[aria-label="Close current version and start new version"]')
Click locator('[aria-label="Close current version and start new version"]')
Expect "toHaveAttribute" locator('[data-test-mo-question-name="Multiple choice buttons with Radio buttons / CheckBoxes"]').getByRole('radio', { name: 'No' })
